purpose: Route ambiguous legal requests to the narrowest child across commercial contract review and operational privacy-compliance work.
selection_order: Operational privacy-compliance work beats general contract review when the request is about DSARs, breach response, privacy obligations, cross-border transfers, or regulatory monitoring.
Contract review beats compliance when the main deliverable is clause-by-clause redlines, playbook deviation analysis, or broader agreement negotiation.
For DPA overlap, pick legal-compliance when privacy law obligations are the real question and contract-review when the DPA is one part of a broader agreement review.

children.name: legal-compliance
children.summary: Supports operational privacy-compliance work such as DPA obligations, DSARs, breach timing, transfer checks, and regulatory monitoring.
route_when: The request is about GDPR, UK GDPR, CCPA/CPRA, DSARs, breach-notification timing, cross-border transfers, DPIAs, or privacy operational workflows.
The request asks about DPA terms, transfer mechanics, or privacy-law compliance obligations rather than broad commercial contract redlines.
avoid_when: The main deliverable is full commercial agreement review, clause-by-clause redlines, or negotiation fallback language across many clause types.
The request is broader contract playbook review where privacy is only one clause family among several.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this nested child path before routing when the runtime cannot discover legal children automatically.

children.name: contract-review
children.summary: Reviews commercial agreements against a negotiation playbook, flags deviations, and proposes practical redlines and fallback positions.
route_when: The request is to review, negotiate, or redline an agreement against a playbook or market-standard commercial positions.
The main output is clause-by-clause risk assessment, redline language, fallback positions, or negotiation priorities across a broader contract.
avoid_when: The request is primarily about operational privacy compliance, DSAR handling, breach timelines, transfer impact, or regulatory monitoring.
The DPA/privacy question is really about compliance obligations rather than broader agreement negotiation.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this nested child path before routing when the runtime cannot discover legal children automatically.
